meta.title: Negative-knowledge registry — consolidated graveyard
meta.discipline: Consolidation + standardization of EXISTING elimination knowledge. No new edge metric computed. No candidate revived/re-parametrized/sign-flipped. Metrics transcribed from recorded artifacts (Stage-0 JSON / results JSON / graveyard markdown / RESEARCH_REGISTRY verdict text); never fabricated. Where a value is not in the artifacts it is 'NOT-RECORDED' or 'UNKNOWN'.
meta.phase5_localization: See localization_phase5 (cross-repo localization + status verification of the Phase-2 absent items). Localization only; no revival, no recompute. C7/C8/C9 = LOCATED-VERIFIED in lab-demo-clone1 (committed-motor C-series; measured-NEGATIVE — CORRECTS the Phase-2 'absent' / early-Phase-5 'UNLOCATED' finding, which searched the wrong sibling lab); Grup-C = LOCATED-VERIFIED; NRR-009 + DEC-053 = LOCATED-PARTIAL; DEC-054 + S#13/15/16 = UNLOCATED.

entries.title: Static value factor (clean-universe, bm-primary)

primary_metric.name: NW-t (cost-free Gate-2)
primary_metric.note: Edge is illiquidity-concentrated; significance never present.

entries.why: On the D-202 clean universe (681 symbols) static value fails Gate-2 (cost-free NW |t|=0.76 << 2.0) and the apparent return is illiquidity-concentrated. The earlier EDGE-6 +12.9pp claim was a broken D-200 (dirty-universe) artifact and is void. Value is a SERAP (mirage).
entries.reproducible_note: Committed harness/verdict tests pass; recorded edge-metric end-to-end uses git-ignored panels (data-wall) — not numerically re-run, by design (no new edge metric).
entries.revival_note: Value closed across 3 independent measurements (D-203 SERAP + D-Y1-001 FRAGILE + NRR-008 ELENDI). Fourth round forbidden.

entries.title: EDGE-2 equal-weight composite (mom120 + hi52 + lowvol63)

primary_metric.name: liquid-tercile honest edge (recorded)
primary_metric.note: Real but post-2022 NARROWING (not widening); its deployable constituents each closed individually (hi52, lowvol63, mom120).

entries.why: EDGE-2 is a genuine composite edge (~0.54%/month liquid-tercile) but it narrows post-2022 rather than widening, and every deployable constituent factor was isolated and individually eliminated (hi52 KESIN-KAPANDI, lowvol63 SERAP, mom120 never passed isolated). The composite is an overlay candidate only; the deployable path is closed because its components are. Not itself a clean FAIL — recorded here as the parent whose decomposition closed the cross-sectional factor program.
entries.reproducible_note: Committed harness tests pass; full edge-metric re-run gated by git-ignored panels (data-wall).
entries.revival_note: Constituent factors permanently closed; composite has no deployable component left.

entries.title: 52-week-high proximity factor

primary_metric.name: NW-t (D-208 fair-cost Gate-2)
primary_metric.note: Pre-cost t=1.70 (CI includes zero); raw long-short +2.26%/mo t=2.96 but retail-tradeable significance absent on fair ground.

entries.why: hi52 was D-203's strongest/most-regime-robust factor (raw long-short +2.26%/mo, t=2.96). D-204 showed it is GERCEK-ama-tradeable-DEGIL (realistic round-trip ~340bp > breakeven ~302bp; the liquidity-paradox is a cost-mirage). D-205 (liquid-first) re-confirmed not-tradeable. D-208 re-tested on the D-207-corrected (un-inflated) cost model: gate5 then passes, but the real wall moved from 'cost kills' to 'significance kills' — Gate-2 NW |t|=1.17 (pre-cost 1.70). Closed on fair ground.
entries.reproducible_note: test_d204_hi52_stress + test_d205_hi52_liquid pass; cost-model fidelity (D-207) and verdict logic intact.
entries.revival_note: Three escalating re-tests (D-204/D-205/D-208) all not-tradeable; the last on a fair (un-inflated cost) ground.

entries.title: 63-day low-volatility factor (isolated)

primary_metric.name: NW-t (cost-free Gate-2)
primary_metric.note: Carrier failure is Gate-4 liquidity_collapse: illiquid +1.20%/mo vs liquid -0.31%/mo.

entries.why: lowvol63 was hidden inside the EDGE-2 composite but never passed isolated. 0/5 cost-free gates; the carrier reason is Gate-4 liquidity_collapse (edge exists only in illiquid names: illiquid +1.20%/mo vs liquid -0.31%/mo) plus Gate-2 NW |t|=0.94 (reproducing the lab pre-indicator). After realistic cost -0.82%/mo. When isolated, unlike hi52, no distinct edge emerged — the observed positivity was a liquidity premium.
entries.reproducible_note: test_nrr007_lowvol63 passes incl. committed-engine-dispatch-untouched + verdict-logic; data-wall on full re-run.
entries.revival_note: Isolated measurement; liquidity-premium not a deployable edge.

entries.title: 120-day momentum factor (component / adversarial control)

primary_metric.name: NW-t (RR-Y1-008 Mod-A conjugate, scope re-run)
primary_metric.note: agreement_pass=False (conjugate-agreement fails); also used as adversarial cherry-pick control in RR-Y1-008 Part-2.

entries.why: mom120 is an EDGE-2 constituent that never passed isolated. In RR-Y1-008 (validator red-team, known-answer) mom120 held its graveyard verdict (Mod-A conjugate t=1.76, agreement_pass=False, sign-consistency 0.84). It also served as the cherry-pick base in the adversarial Part-2 (mom120_cont_w), where the single-split layer caught the overfit (X2-IC NW-t=1.992<2). No dedicated D-NNN graveyard report exists; recorded here as a closed component.
entries.reproducible_note: Engine NW primitives + conjugate-agreement determinism pinned (test_engine_stats); RR-Y1-008 example is examples-tier.
entries.revival_note: Closed component of EDGE-2; reproduced graveyard verdict under the validator's known-answer test.

entries.title: Value regime-gated tilt (DIRECTION-not-LEVEL arm)

primary_metric.name: NW-t (cost-free Gate-2)
primary_metric.note: ≈ D-203 static 0.76 — regime-gating added zero significance.

entries.why: The untested single arm 'value-tilt active only in a favorable macro regime' (trailing-12m YoY-CPI 6-month direction, t-1 lag, look-ahead-safe). Closing the disinflation months (OFF=31/81) did not raise significance at all: cost-free NW |t|=0.759 ≈ the D-203 static 0.76. Gate-1/3/4 pass but the core Gate-2 fails again; edge still illiquidity-leaning (Gate-4 illiquid +0.96% vs liquid +0.07%). The problem is not mis-timing — even in the ON regime the edge is weak. This is value's 3rd and final round.
entries.reproducible_note: test_nrr008_value_regime passes incl. run_gates_on_score==engine replica MATCH + regime-mask logic; data-wall on full re-run.
entries.revival_note: Value thread definitively closed (D-203 + D-Y1-001 + NRR-008 = 3 measurements).

entries.title: Value-only regime-resilience (frozen DEC-Y1 P/B primary)

primary_metric.name: robustness gate (E/P arm)
primary_metric.note: Primary P/B mechanical PASS (4/4) but E/P robustness fails gate1+gate4; OOS collapses; no disinflation premium.

entries.why: Value-only regime-resilience test. The frozen DEC-Y1 primary (P/B) passes the mechanical bar (4/4) but robustness (E/P) fails gate1+gate4, out-of-sample collapses, and there is no disinflation premium — so it is not a stable premium, it is FRAGILE / regime-dependent. The RR-Y1 thesis (BIST value is macro-regime-driven, not publication-decay) is confirmed. A fast Yol-2 overlay promotion is NOT recommended.
entries.reproducible_note: No dedicated committed test module located for D-Y1-001 in master; Stage-0 + results JSON present but no determinism vector wired into CI.
entries.revival_note: Part of value's 3-measurement closure; fragile/regime-dependent, not a stable deployable premium.

entries.title: H2b dividend run-up (capture window)

primary_metric.name: NW-t (V1 liquid cost-free)
primary_metric.note: Famous ALL-universe pre-cost NW-t=2.565 is illiquidity-driven; deployable liquid universe cost-free t=0.61, after-cost t=0.074; V2 liquid negative.

entries.why: H2b was the graveyard's only remaining t>=2 candidate, but its famous NW-t=2.57 is an ALL-universe (illiquidity-driven) statistic. Detection reproduced exactly (1108 events/265 symbols). In the deployable liquid universe even cost-free NW-t=0.61 (V2 liquid t=-0.34, negative). After cost: V1 ALL -0.123%/day (NW-t=-2.27, illiquid cost-wall), V1 LIQUID +0.0068%/day (NW-t=0.074, breakeven-below). The wall in the liquid universe is SIGNIFICANCE, not cost (~28bp cheap). hi52's twin, confirmed by measurement.
entries.reproducible_note: test_d209_h2b_runup passes incl. detection reproduction + verdict logic; data-wall on full panel re-run.
entries.revival_note: Cross-sectional graveyard's last t>=2 candidate; closed on fair (corrected-cost) ground. N<=3 final.

entries.title: Holding NAV-discount-Z time-series mean-reversion

primary_metric.name: pooled FE-within-beta
primary_metric.note: Wrong sign (MR-opposite); 0/5 gates; G2 Driscoll-Kraay |t|=-0.81, boot-p=0.43, same-sign 2/6.

entries.why: New paradigm (time-series, not cross-sectional) after the cross-sectional factor program exhausted 3/3. Each holding's own discount-Z trailing-36m standardized, hypothesis discount-Z-high -> forward-return positive (Pontiff 1995 CEF-MR). FIDELITY-GUARD passed (median-corr 0.999). But pooled FE-within-beta=-0.0185 (wrong sign, MR-opposite); 5-gate 0/5 (G2 DK|t|=-0.81/boot-p=0.43; G3 null-pctile 0.27; G4 not-both-positive). BIST holding NAV-discount shows no mean-reversion in the measured window. Signal-absent -> the full RR-013 architectural step is not triggered.
entries.reproducible_note: test_d206_nav_discount passes; full re-run uses git-ignored degoran/market-cap panels (data-wall).
entries.revival_note: Holding-discount paradigm SERAP in measured window (N<=3 lock 1/3; OOS-weak + N=6 survivorship open-declared). The distinct fund/CEF NAV-arb mechanism (RR-045 -> NRR-009) is a separate axis, not yet measured in master.

entries.title: Aggregate foreign-flow -> forward BIST index real return

primary_metric.name: primary NW-HAC t (lag-2 knowable)
primary_metric.note: slope=-0.252, R^2=0.002. Contemporaneous lag-0 STRONG (NW-t=3.68, R^2=0.18) but non-deployable: flow is co-movement, not lead.

entries.why: Single-asset timing on a price-orthogonal axis. NF_pct(t-2) (~6-week publication lag, knowable) -> XU100 TL-real. Primary NW |t|=0.73 (slope negative, R^2=0.002); regime-stable but stable-ZERO; deploy-leg net cumulative TL-real -7.6% vs buy-hold +51.2% (cost is NOT the issue: switch 5.28bp). Most instructive: contemporaneous lag-0 is strongly positive (NW-t=3.68) but NON-deployable — flow is the co-movement of price, not its predictor; in the ~6-week-knowable lag-2 form the content vanishes. RR-038's 'index-foreign LEAD' claim is refuted in the knowable form. Wall = significance/content-absence (3rd timing-defeat, DISC-2).
entries.reproducible_note: test_d211_foreign_flow passes incl. NW-OLS slope recovery + hash-drift guard + Stage-0 refusal; NW-stat pinned via test_engine_stats equivalence.
entries.revival_note: Knowable-form content absent; co-movement is not a lead. OOS gap (single regime) noted but verdict is content-absence, not power.

entries.title: Ex-ante real rate -> forward XU100 TL-real return

primary_metric.name: primary ex-ante lag-1 NW-HAC t
primary_metric.note: slope=-0.00100 (CORRECT sign: tight policy bad for equities), R^2=0.032. Weak-but-correct-direction; AR1=0.986 (Stambaugh bias lowers true-t further).

entries.why: Ex-ante real rate r(t-1)=APIFON4-ENFBEK level (knowable ~t+15d) -> XU100 TL-real. keep-bar[1] FAIL: primary lag-1 NW |t|=1.82 (<2; slope correct-signed -0.00100); regime-stable (both halves negative); deploy-leg net +85.5% vs buy-hold +47.5% but rel-NW-t=0.16 (only 4 switches). Distinct from D-211: here lag-1 ~ lag-0 (nearly identical), so the knowable form is as strong as the contemporaneous — the content is simply WEAK (sub-significance), not staleness-handicapped. The wall = significance (weak content). Hypothesis is not fully empty (D-211) but WEAK-AND-CORRECTLY-SIGNED.
entries.reproducible_note: test_d213_real_rate passes incl. deploy-rule sign + ex-ante lag-1 alignment + hash guard; NW-stat pinned via test_engine_stats equivalence.
entries.revival_note: Weak-but-correct-direction; explicitly flagged as a future regime-change OOS re-examination rationale (deploy-candidate-NO). OOS gap: 2019-2026 is a single high-inflation regime, no real disinflation OOS yet.

entries.title: VIOP SSF open-interest growth (K2) cross-sectional tilt

primary_metric.name: NW-t (tilt active return)
primary_metric.note: Essentially zero (noise), not just below threshold.

entries.why: K2 = (OI_t - OI_{t-1})/OI_{t-1} shows no cross-sectional predictive power for next-month spot return (NW-t=-0.073). OI measures contract demand, not informed flow direction (unsigned by construction); thin cross-section (63 VIOP SSF tickers); front-month exclusion removes the most-liquid contracts; post-2022 regime flip (pre-2022 +1.82 ann vs post-2022 -1.02 ann). Consistent with noise, not alpha.
entries.reproducible_note: test_viop_k2_harness passes incl. test_stage0_content_hash_stable (hash 34d312edf5b3c27b) + PM-1 compliance + signal scoring; engine-output JSON git-ignored (data-wall on numeric).
entries.revival_note: Stage-0 commitment: thread closes on a single run; no post-hoc variant chain (K2-basis/direction/size). K1 and K3 characterization signals blocked.

entries.title: XU030 periodic-reconstitution IN demand-shock event study

primary_metric.name: KB1 NW-HAC t (N=24, lag=3, net)
primary_metric.note: Full-sample statistical zero. KB2 sign-flip FAIL (half-A +3.79% NW-t=+4.11 vs half-B -3.58% NW-t=-0.90). KB3 gross 57.5bp > cost 46.8bp PASS (barely).

entries.why: XU030-IN periodic reconstitution: mechanical price-insensitive passive demand in the announcement-to-effective window (mean 13.5 days). Full-sample NW-t=0.052 (gross mean CAR +0.58%, pure noise). Dramatic temporal break: first-12 (2019-2023) +3.79% NW-t=+4.11 vs last-12 (2023-2025) -3.58% NW-t=-0.90 — sign fully reversed (Stage-0 froze the split, not post-hoc). Mechanism likely priced at the 11-19-day public announcement window (arbs pre-position); early-period strength was the small passive-fund universe. N=24 dominated by stock-specific noise (AEFES -29%, DSTKF +26%, AKSEN +21%). NOT-TRADEABLE (SERAP).
entries.reproducible_note: Standalone scratch script (CI-impact zero); Stage-0 asserts data hashes (panel sha256 d94b910003c7d11b, prices ccabef3d6622841b) on load but the panels live under git-ignored data/snapshots — no committed determinism vector. Verdict artifacts (Stage-0 + results + graveyard) are present and internally consistent.
entries.revival_note: Sign-flip ban (DEC-053, directive-referenced) + post-hoc rescue forbidden (sub-sample / tier-widening / outlier-removal / window-widening all blocked); K1/K3 chain blocked. NOTE: DEC-053/DEC-054 are directive-referenced but NOT present in master (see consistency audit).

entries.title: PM-1 forgone-beta invariant (idle = fully-invested EW benchmark)

primary_metric.name: design invariant (not an edge)
primary_metric.note: PM-1 is a benchmark/accounting invariant, not a measured edge.

entries.why: PM-1 is not an edge candidate. It is the forgone-beta invariant baked into the validation engine: idle capital is benchmarked as fully-invested equal-weight, so a tilt must beat the always-invested EW baseline (no free credit for sitting in cash). 'Graveyard code that produced a law' — it is a permanent design constraint enforced by the engine (pm1_compliant flag on Stage-0; PM-1 guard in src/engine), not a deployable signal.
entries.reproducible_note: PM-1 guard enforced by committed engine; test_engine_contracts + Stage-0 pm1_compliant flag pinned.
entries.revival_note: Permanent invariant; not subject to revival semantics.
